g.text: MILESTONE 2 — Write Buffer + Timer Heap (conn.c / timer.c)
rdllist | list_head | fds ready since last wait
Phase 1 | I/O Dispatch | dispatching=1 | callbacks fire
Phase 2 | Apply Pending | epoll_ctl deferred ops
Phase 3 | Deferred Tasks | reactor_defer queue | nextTick
Phase 4 | Expire Timers | min-heap walk | close idle
READING_HEADERS → parse until CRLF CRLF found
KEEP_ALIVE → reset state, await next request
read 1 chunk | epoll re-notifies if data remains
arm on EAGAIN | disarm on drain | else 100% CPU
realpath() sanitize | MIME table | read()+write() | sendfile() path
